full_text:
Teng Mu 滕牧
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Teng Mu (滕牧). Used by the court as a mouthpiece for their grievances with Sun Hao. Teng Mu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
